title: skopeo login failed when registry server is using a different port number instead of 443.
body:
## skopeo version

```console
$ skopeo --version
skopeo version 1.12.0
```

## To reproduce:
0. Do not execute `docker login` before running `skopeo login`.
    (make sure login credentials don't exist in the local config.)
1.  Execute `skopeo login` to the registry server using another port number:
    ```console
    $ skopeo login -v h2.hxstarrys.me:30003
    ```
1. Input username & password
1. `skopeo login` failed and the error message is:
    ```console
    % skopeo login -v h2.hxstarrys.me:30003
    Username: admin
    Password: 
    FATA[0021] authenticating creds for "h2.hxstarrys.me:30003": Get "https://h2.hxstarrys.me/service/token?account=admin&service=harbor-registry": dial tcp 3.123.1.1:443: connect: operation timed out 
    ```

    The error message shows it's trying to connect to port `443` instead of port `30003`.

comments.body: This issue is caused by my wrong Harbor configuration.
